source: GitHub public repository search and official GitHub repository pages
policy: These entries are design references, not factual evidence.
Do not clone large repositories by default.
Do not copy visual identity, logos, proprietary copy, or paid template assets.
Use only layout, component taxonomy, interaction pattern, motion pattern, and export workflow ideas.
Promote a candidate into a route-specific case only after visual review and license check.

candidates.name: twentyhq/twenty
candidates.purpose: Reference polished CRM/workflow product UI for dense business objects, views, lists, and operational workspaces.
candidates.style: modern CRM, object views, workflow surfaces, professional SaaS with high interaction density
candidates.notes: Strong candidate for business-workflow information architecture. Use as layout and interaction reference only.

candidates.name: ant-design/ant-design-pro
candidates.purpose: Reference enterprise admin dashboard structure, responsive layouts, page templates, tables, forms, and Ant Design workflow density.
candidates.style: enterprise admin, Ant Design, structured page templates, dense but orderly business UI
disabled_when: blindly adopting Ant Design default theme
candidates.notes: Best used for enterprise structure and component taxonomy, then restyled through NERO tokens.

candidates.name: tremorlabs/tremor
candidates.purpose: Reference data-rich dashboard components, metric cards, charts, and analytics interface patterns.
candidates.style: analytics dashboard components, chart-forward, Tailwind-compatible, data-heavy UI
disabled_when: using chart components without source/unit/period labels
candidates.notes: Good dashboard component reference. NERO chart evidence rules still override visual convenience.

candidates.name: arhamkhnz/next-shadcn-admin-dashboard
candidates.purpose: Reference shadcn admin layouts, prebuilt dashboard variants, theme presets, and flexible sidebar/content structures.
candidates.style: modern shadcn dashboard, configurable layouts, CRM/finance/analytics dashboard variants
disabled_when: needs strict Carbon or Ant Design enterprise controls
candidates.notes: Useful as a shadcn dashboard pattern source; strip decorative themes before NERO use.

candidates.name: plannotator/effective-html
candidates.purpose: Reference self-contained HTML artifacts, SVG-first architecture diagrams, visual plan pages, and single-file HTML explainers that can improve NERO frontend prototypes and web PPT drafts.
candidates.style: self-contained HTML artifact, pragmatic visual plan, SVG-first architecture diagram, dark-mode aware single-file deliverable
disabled_when: enterprise component system is the primary need
copying upstream example pages or bundled sample data directly
exact financial facts, source notes, or regulatory conclusions have not been verified
candidates.notes: Use as a lightweight rule and example reference. Main repo is MIT; bundled html-effectiveness examples are Apache-2.0. Do not install as an independent default Skill.

candidates.name: vercel/satori
candidates.purpose: Reference JSX/HTML-to-SVG static rendering patterns for report cards, OG images, and long-image components.
candidates.style: programmatic static image rendering, precise layout, font-aware SVG output
candidates.notes: Reference rendering workflow and constraints, not a final design style.

candidates.name: kvnang/workers-og
candidates.purpose: Reference edge-style social card generation and browser-less image generation workflow.
candidates.style: fast OG image generation, simple API, HTML-like authoring
disabled_when: formal long research image with complex chart composition
font-sensitive Chinese final output without QA
candidates.notes: Secondary candidate behind Satori for NERO; useful for API shape and rendering architecture.

candidates.name: gitbrent/PptxGenJS
candidates.purpose: Reference native PPTX generation patterns, slide masters, tables, charts, images, and editable output.
candidates.style: programmatic PPTX, OOXML-compatible, editable business slides
disabled_when: using generated images as final text
candidates.notes: Primary PPT production reference for NERO.

candidates.name: slidevjs/themes
candidates.purpose: Reference theme packaging and visual system structure for Slidev/web decks.
candidates.style: themeable developer presentations, reusable theme packages, screenshots and packages
disabled_when: formal banker PPTX editing fidelity is required
Chinese financial tables dominate the deck
candidates.notes: Use for theme-system inspiration, not as default formal PPTX path.

candidates.name: op7418/guizang-ppt-skill
candidates.purpose: Reference HTML web PPT design system for editorial-magazine and Swiss-style horizontal decks, screenshot handling, image-slot discipline, and browser-based presentation QA.
candidates.style: single-file HTML deck, editorial magazine, Swiss International Style, screenshot backgrounds, strict layout rhythm
disabled_when: formal client deliverable requires permissive assets
copying AGPL templates or scripts into NERO production
exact financial tables or regulatory wording would be embedded in generated images
candidates.notes: AGPL-3.0 upstream. Use as restricted design reference and NERO-native rule source only; do not clone or copy full templates/assets by default.

candidates.name: remotion-dev/remotion
candidates.purpose: Reference programmatic React video architecture, composition patterns, templates, showcase examples, and licensing boundary.
candidates.style: React-based video generation, reusable components, CSS/SVG/Canvas/WebGL motion
candidates.notes: Primary short-video production reference. License check remains mandatory.

candidates.name: reactvideoeditor/remotion-templates
candidates.purpose: Reference reusable Remotion components for effects, chart/data animations, and scene-level motion patterns.
candidates.style: self-contained Remotion components, chart/data animations, reusable motion snippets
candidates.notes: Use only after frame-level readability checks.
